case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO INC. VS. CONCEPCION MARIA SANCHEZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-12-2024 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, CONCEPCION MARIA $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,650.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, CONCEPCION MARIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-09-2024 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $50 SERVED FEB-22-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, CONCEPCION MARIA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-09-2024 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JUN-12-2024 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY VERONICA ROSALES. DEFENDANT CONCEPCION MARIA SANCHEZ IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER NAOMI ADELSON. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
